categories.label: Yoga Teacher
categories.description: Practising yoga instructors who interact regularly with students seeking wellness and holistic health solutions.
categories.rationale: Daily contact with health-conscious individuals who may benefit from Panchakarma; established trust with regular students.

categories.label: Ayurveda Beneficiary
categories.description: Individuals who have personally benefited from Ayurvedic treatment and are motivated to share their experience.
categories.rationale: Personal testimony creates authentic referral credibility; deep motivation to help others achieve similar results.

categories.label: Wellness Coach
categories.description: Certified wellness professionals guiding clients through lifestyle, nutrition, and holistic health programmes.
categories.rationale: Existing client base seeking integrative solutions; positioned to recommend Panchakarma as part of comprehensive treatment plans.

categories.label: Health Influencer
categories.description: Digital creators and thought leaders with engaged audiences in health, wellness, and alternative medicine.
categories.rationale: Broad reach to wellness-oriented audiences; ability to educate and create awareness at scale.
examples: Social media educators in natural health

categories.label: Ayurveda Enthusiast
categories.description: Passionate individuals with deep personal interest in Ayurveda who are embedded in Ayurveda communities.
categories.rationale: Trust within Ayurveda circles; genuine advocacy driven by personal conviction rather than professional obligation.

categories.label: Panchakarma Alumni
categories.description: Individuals who have completed a Panchakarma programme at a Sadaika-affiliated centre.
categories.rationale: First-hand programme experience enables highly credible referrals; strong personal motivation to recommend the programme.

categories.label: Ayurveda Practitioner (Non-Clinical)
categories.description: Non-clinical Ayurveda practitioners offering complementary therapies, lifestyle counselling, or wellness services.
categories.rationale: Professional credibility with health-seeking clients; able to identify clinical referral needs beyond their scope.

categories.label: Ayurveda Practitioner (Clinical)
categories.description: Qualified Ayurveda doctors (BAMS and above) who encounter patients requiring intensive Panchakarma intervention.
categories.rationale: Clinical authority to recommend therapeutic Panchakarma; highest referral credibility with prospective patients.
